channel.title: PodLens
channel.description: Grounded readings, every point traceable to the source.

item.title: A New Perspective on Synaptic Pruning · Soyon Hong
item.description: This paper delves into the role and mechanisms of microglia-mediated synaptic pruning under physiological and pathological conditions. The authors Soyon Hong, Lasse Dissing-Olesen, and Beth Stevens pr…

item.title: Active Forgetting and Neuropsychiatric Diseases · Jacob A. Berry
item.description: In this Expert Review, Jacob A. Berry, Dana C. Guhle, and Ronald L. Davis comprehensively elucidate the neurobiological mechanisms of "active forgetting" and their relationship with neuropsychiatric d…

item.title: Action-Level Mental Model Dataset for Agent Collaboration · Jiaju Chen
item.description: This paper introduces ALMANAC, the first dataset of Action-Level Mental Model Annotations for human-agent collaboration. Although Large Language Model (LLM) agents possess multi-step reasoning and pla…

item.title: Agent Memory: System Characterization and Implications for Long-Horizon Workloads · Yasmine Omri
item.description: This paper presents the first system-level characterization of Agent Memory Systems for Large Language Models (LLMs). As LLM agents are increasingly deployed in long-horizon tasks requiring continuous…

item.title: The Era of Experience: Reinforcement Learning Beyond Human Data · David Silver
item.description: This paper is written by David Silver and Richard S. Sutton (the text is a preprint of a chapter in the forthcoming book Designing an Intelligence to be published by MIT Press). The paper explores how…
